findings.location: sections s7 and beyond (コード値の取得方法, 警告メッセージ, and additional sections)
findings.description: The knowledge file covers only 6 of the 13 h2 sections identified by the automated check. The source ToC explicitly references two more sections not present in the knowledge file: `other_example_code_get` (コード値の取得方法) and `other_example_warn_message` (警告メッセージ). The automated check reports 13 source headings vs 6 knowledge sections, indicating at least 7 sections with substantive implementation content (class names, method signatures, code examples) are completely absent.
findings.source_evidence: ToC in source lists: `other_example_code_get`, `other_example_warn_message` as distinct h2 sections. Automated check: Section count 6 < source headings 13.

findings.location: s3 (設定値の取得方法) — warning block
findings.description: The warning block's bad code examples are omitted. The source provides two concrete anti-pattern code snippets showing exactly what invalid usage looks like (using an entity getter value and a DB row value as part of the key string). These examples help an AI assistant recognize and flag incorrect code.
